summary: US-843 completion gate passed for the single active Spexus component, default. Spexus current_context was read before the epic hierarchy and task records. The required dependency reports were present at the exact accepted paths, valid JSON, matched PERSONAL-EP-180, and reported succeeded status with no risks. Current source/test inspection plus a fresh npm run verify confirmed that local AI decisions are selected from getLegalActions, use deterministic middle-strength phase/context heuristics across bidding, contract ordering, discard, whist/check/pass, all-pass, misere, contract play, settlement, and next-deal transitions, and include actionable diagnostics for no-legal-action or illegal/stuck auto-turn failures. US-scoped integration tests exercise chooseAiAction through applyAction over representative scenarios. No backend, live API, authentication, tenant scope, backend route, server persistence, database migration, or browser API interception path applies to this static local Vite frontend/domain app.

requirements_coverage.evidence: src/ai/heuristicAi.ts, src/ai/heuristicAi.test.ts, src/test/aiDecision.integration.test.ts, src/test/integrationHarness.ts, task-reports/PERSONAL-TASK-1148/attempt-1.json, task-reports/PERSONAL-TASK-1149/attempt-1.json, task-reports/PERSONAL-TASK-1151/attempt-1.json, task-reports/PERSONAL-TASK-1152/attempt-1.json, npm run verify
requirements_coverage.notes: chooseAiAction derives choices from getLegalActions and tests assert returned action keys are present in the legal action set before applyAction is called across representative AI-controlled phases.

requirements_coverage.evidence: src/ai/heuristicAi.ts, src/ai/heuristicAi.test.ts, src/test/aiDecision.integration.test.ts, docs/test-design/us-843-ai-decisions.md, task-reports/PERSONAL-TASK-1147/attempt-1.json, task-reports/PERSONAL-TASK-1148/attempt-1.json, task-reports/PERSONAL-TASK-1149/attempt-1.json, task-reports/PERSONAL-TASK-1152/attempt-1.json, npm run verify
requirements_coverage.notes: AI heuristics use hand strength, winning contract floor, trump, trick, whist/check profile, all-pass and misere play mode, and continuation context. Tests include non-first-action and phase-context assertions rather than exact DOS AI reconstruction.

acceptance_criteria_coverage.evidence: src/ai/heuristicAi.test.ts, src/test/aiDecision.integration.test.ts, src/test/integrationHarness.ts, task-reports/PERSONAL-TASK-1149/attempt-1.json, task-reports/PERSONAL-TASK-1151/attempt-1.json, task-reports/PERSONAL-TASK-1152/attempt-1.json, npm run verify
acceptance_criteria_coverage.notes: Representative AI states assert legal.length > 0, chooseAiAction does not throw, the chosen action is in getLegalActions, and applyAction accepts the choice.

acceptance_criteria_coverage.evidence: src/ai/heuristicAi.test.ts, src/test/aiDecision.integration.test.ts, docs/test-design/us-843-ai-decisions.md, task-reports/PERSONAL-TASK-1147/attempt-1.json, task-reports/PERSONAL-TASK-1148/attempt-1.json, task-reports/PERSONAL-TASK-1149/attempt-1.json, npm run verify
acceptance_criteria_coverage.notes: Bidding, whist, contract play, all-pass, and misere scenarios demonstrate phase/context awareness and include assertions that avoid accepting a generic phase-blind first-action strategy.

component_coverage.limitations: Spexus current_context lists only the default component for this project. Other modified files in the worktree belong to adjacent stories and were used only as dependency/context where relevant.

evidence_matrix.scenario: AI chooses exactly one action from the legal action set returned by the rules engine while an AI player is active.
